Option.Description: Max number of concurrent HTTP requests. Minimum is 1 and maximum is 32. (default: 8)
Sets the current working directory. (default: current directory)
Recursion depth. Only applied when --recurse is also specified. Minimum is 1 and maximum is 16. Set to 0 to search arbitrary directory depth. (default: 4)
Lists current packages and their versions even if they have no upgrade available. (default: false)
Path to a .csproj file to search for upgrades. Exclusive with --solution. (default: searches for .csproj files in the current directory)
Shows absolute paths when printing projects and solutions. (default: false)
Path to a .sln file to search for projects. Exclusive with --project. (default: searches for .sln files in the current directory if no .csproj files are found)
Determines the version to upgrade to: latest, greatest, major, minor, patch, pre-major, pre-minor, pre-patch. (default: latest)
Upgrades packages to the appropriate version based on the current --target option. (default: false)
Shows the version of the application. Exits after outputting the version.
